runtime.model_license_note: Local OpenAI-compatible endpoint; verify the served model license and acceptable-use policy.
recovery_guidance: If the server is not running, start the runtime server and retry with external-check --live.
If the model is not found, pull or load the model and verify the --model id.
If the output is inconclusive, inspect raw_responses/ and rerun with --temperature 0.0 and more repeats.

safety_note: Experimental external run. Not a benchmark-grade measurement. Synthetic prompts only. No real data or tool execution.
